title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Joint Municipal Peace and Order Council (MPOC) and Municipal Anti-drug Abuse Council (MADAC) 2022-02, Dated February 23, 2022, ?resolution Realigning the Amount of Fifty-five Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 55,000.00) From the Appropriation of Drug Clearing Program to Procure Various Equipment Needed for the Implementation of the National Police Clearance System and Further Approving the Same.? (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 03/07/2022)
